value: The probe contains within-target RANKING information, but its score is not calibrated as a stable pooled cross-target / cross-regime competence estimand. Competence information exists; the estimand does not transport.

C19's pooled 0.561 is CONSERVATIVE relative to its per-target ~0.64 (pooling misaligns cross-target offsets and lowers the AUC), so C19's in-regime positive is if anything under-stated by pooling -- it stands.
C20 did NOT succeed under a better estimand. within-target ~0.64 is a mechanism / future-work observation, NOT a retroactive replacement of the pre-registered pooled estimand.
